pr.title: Add Installation Guide section to README with Docker setup and agent integration placeholders
pr.body:
Adds a dedicated installation section in `README.md` before **Status**, so users can quickly understand prerequisites, pull the published image, and find where agent-specific setup docs will live.

- **Installation Guide structure**
  - Introduced `## Installation Guide` after the example use cases.
  - Added subsections:
    - `### Prerequisites`
    - `### Download`
    - `### Integrating With Your AI Agent`

- **Prerequisites content**
  - Clarifies that Docker is required.
  - States that RUC is an MCP server running inside a Docker container.
  - Added explainer links for:
    - MCP: `https://modelcontextprotocol.io/`
    - Docker: `https://www.docker.com/`
  - Added Docker install docs by platform:
    - Windows
    - Mac
    - Linux

- **Image download instructions**
  - Documents the published image location: `ghcr.io/mighty-data-inc/ruc-mcp`
  - Added pull command:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/mighty-data-inc/ruc-mcp:latest
```

- **Agent integration scaffolding**
  - Added placeholder sub-subsections for future integration instructions:
    - `#### VS Code`
    - `#### Cursor`
    - `#### Claude Desktop`
    - `#### Codex`
pr.author: Copilot
